name: In Vivo High-Resolution Inner Ear Imaging Grant Application

sections.name: project_summary
sections.title: Project Summary
sections.instructions: Provide a concise overview of the proposed research, including the problem being addressed, the approach, and expected outcomes.

sections.name: specific_aims
sections.title: Specific Aims
sections.instructions: List the specific objectives of the proposed research, including the technology development and its application in imaging the inner ear.

sections.name: research_strategy_overview
sections.title: Research Strategy Overview
sections.instructions: Provide an overview of the research strategy, including the background of the proposed technology, its innovation and significance to imaging human inner ear, and feasibility of the approach.

sections.name: research_strategy_point_1
sections.title: Research Strategy: Imaging Improvement Type
sections.instructions: Detail the specific type of imaging (spatial, temporal, or functional) that will be improved by this project.

sections.name: research_strategy_point_2
sections.title: Research Strategy: Resolution Increase and Impact
sections.instructions: Specify the amount of increase in image resolution compared to current techniques and its potential impact on the diagnosis and/or treatment of human inner ear pathology.

sections.name: research_strategy_point_3
sections.title: Research Strategy: Clinical Translation Plan
sections.instructions: Provide a detailed plan and timeline for translating the proposed work into a clinical setting for non-invasive use with awake humans, addressing limitations and possible solutions.

sections.name: research_strategy_point_4
sections.title: Research Strategy: Clinical Settings and Conditions
sections.instructions: Describe the specific clinical settings and conditions under which the technique could be used, how it would inform clinical care and management, and how it might guide clinical decision-making.

sections.name: research_strategy_point_5
sections.title: Research Strategy: Pathologies and Treatments
sections.instructions: Describe which inner ear pathologies may be better diagnosed and what treatments might be feasible with the increased resolution.

sections.name: data_management_sharing_plan
sections.title: Data Management and Sharing Plan
sections.instructions: Describe the plan for data management and sharing, including compliance with NIH guidelines.

sections.name: human_subjects_section
sections.title: PHS Human Subjects and Clinical Trials Information
sections.instructions: Address the inclusion of women and minorities, if human subjects are involved in the research.
